message:
feat(sync): improve sync robustness and configuration handling

Enhances the br sync command with better error handling and
configuration management.

Changes:
- Updated Cargo.lock with dependency versions
- Improved sync command error messages
- Better configuration validation in config/mod.rs
- Refined sync module error handling

These changes improve reliability when syncing across
different environments and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
